summary: Cycles 1-4: 15/18 bugs fixed. Remaining 3 are LOW severity.

remaining.description: generate_npc_card() produces only 2 options but bible requires 3. If consumed without _ensure_3_options(), UI may crash on index 2 access.
remaining.suggested_fix: Add third option or ensure card passes through _ensure_3_options()

remaining.description: Thread-unsafe stat reads: _update_stats() locks mutex for writes, but get_model_info() reads stats without locking, creating potential data race.
remaining.suggested_fix: Lock mutex in get_model_info() or copy stats under lock

remaining.description: log_aspect_shifted() renamed to log_reputation_changed(). Callers in docs still reference old name.

fixed_this_cycle.fix: Dead Flux ref in RAG → reads hidden.tension
Removed dead Souffle cost on center option
